# Jacob Morales

First mentioned: **3307-05-21**  
Last mentioned: **3308-01-31**  
Total mentions: **6**

## Related


## Biography

Captain Jacob Morales is the commanding officer of the Alexandria, an Aegis-owned megaship that vanished in hyperspace in June 3307 with over four thousand crewmembers aboard. The Alexandria was transporting a large quantity of Guardian artefacts from the Delphi system when it triggered a Thargoid attack in HIP 16538 on 20 May 3307.

To reduce the risk of further casualties, Aegis plotted a route to a low-population prison colony in the HIP 30944 system. All independent ships were undocked before the megaship made its hyperspace jump on 3 June 3307, but the Alexandria never reached its destination and all communication ceased. Admiral Aden Tanner announced that Captain Morales and his crew would be listed as missing presumed dead, noting that "in addition to this great tragedy, Aegis's research programme into Guardian technology has been severely impacted by the loss of many precious artefacts." Morales's disappearance became a turning point for Aegis, triggering a superpower inquiry, forcing senior resignations including Professor Alba Tesreau, and creating a vacuum that Salvation's alternative anti-xeno effort rapidly began to fill.
